text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've heard about "pulling out all the stops", 
and now I understand what it means…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll run turf, dirt — whatever it takes to see 
my horsies shining up close and personal!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If it's for my oshis, I'll gladly line up in the 
freezing cold to buy merch or get up at 
the break of dawn in the summer heat!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huehehe! No battleground is too harrowing 
when it comes to my horsies! Facing hardship 
only makes a hero stronger!
